// src/pages/Tracking/Tracking.jsx import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Tracking = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('onprogress'); const trucks = [ { id: 1, status: 'onprogress', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150', gate: 'Gate 1', timestamp: '2025-04-15 10:34:21', note: 'Masih input nomor kendaraan' }, { id: 2, status: 'finished', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150', gate: 'Gate 4', timestamp: '2025-04-15 09:10:45', note: 'Sudah sampai tujuan' }, { id: 3, status: 'trouble', image: 'https://via.placeholder.com/150', gate: 'Gate 2', timestamp: '2025-04-15 08:15:32', note: 'Ban bocor di perjalanan' } ]; const filteredTrucks = trucks.filter(truck => truck.status === activeTab); return (
{/* Sidebar */}

{filteredTrucks.map(truck => (

))}
); }; export default Tracking;
